short_description-en_US: Still natural mineral water from Alpine springs. 500ml recyclable bottle.
Refreshing lemon-flavoured carbonated drink in a 330ml slim can.
ingredients_list-en_US: Carbonated water, sugar, natural lemon flavourings, citric acid.

short_description-en_US: Fresh whole milk from pasture-raised cows. 1L carton. Contains milk.
Aged 12-month Dutch Gouda, semi-hard, creamy with a nutty finish. 200g wedge.

Smooth Swiss milk chocolate bar. 80g. Contains milk and soy.

short_description-en_US: Durum wheat penne from Italy. 500g. 11-minute cook time. Vegan.

short_description-en_US: Raw unfiltered acacia honey in a 350g glass jar. Spanish origin.
